summary: International user ESPN Sunday Night Baseball - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for live game playback
AND an ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game is on the schedule

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses any scheduled/in-progress ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is a dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND a Blackout pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile
